title: Mouth & Tooth
description: 👄 The Maw is a grotesque mouth that can spawn in daylight and silently stalk you.
body:
👄 The Maw is a grotesque mouth that can spawn in daylight and silently stalk you.
When it sees you:
— 🏃 It runs toward you.
— 🦷 If it bites you, you’re teleported… inside it.

Welcome to the Dimension of Teeth.
🦷 Every block is made of teeth and flesh.
👹 Horrific tooth-monsters hunt you relentlessly.
🗡️ But if you’re brave enough to survive, you might craft a deadly Toothblade from them.

☠️ There’s only one way out… survive or die.
Until then, you’re trapped in the jaws of terror.

📌 Requirements (for both):
🧪 Requires: [✨ GeckoLib ✨]
🎮 Version: Minecraft 1.20.1
